title: GEEPAS 12" Silent Analog Clock with 3D Rose Gold Dial, Modern Round Timepiece for Kitchen, Bathroom, Living Room, Office – Battery Operated Non-Ticking Design
features: ✅ PERFECT SIZE, HIGH-QUALITY - This watch gives accurate time and an absolutely silent environment. Great for any room at home, work office, or classroom. The classic glass frame will dress up any room's decor such as your kitchen, living room, bedroom, family room, meeting room, or dining room.

✅ EASY TO READ - Extra-large and vintage numbers, Stylish modern dial with 3D relief numbers on a white background. Perfect for a classroom, office, or home. Make the vision clearer without any trouble at all. Perfect for adding artful appeal to your wall.

✅ QUIET & SILENT MOVEMENT -The clock is silent so you do not need to worry about the constant ticking of regular clocks when you need some peace and quiet to concentrate on your work or enjoy a full night of undisturbed sleep.
✅ EASY TO USE - The clock comes with hooks to ensure easy installation. Powered by 1 AA battery(not included) and the back slot makes it easy to hang.
✅ EASY TO HANG : Come with a hook can be easily installed through the slot on the back of the clock.
description: Product Description QUIET MOVEMENT Silent clock with no ticking sound – ideal for focused work or a restful, undisturbed night’s sleep. HIGH-QUALITY BUILT Accurate timekeeping & silent ticking—ideal wall clock for home, office, or classroom décor. EASY TO HANG Easily wall-mountable clock with built-in hook slot for quick and secure installation anywhere. EASY TO READ Extra-large 3D relief numbers with vintage charm, modern dial on white background for easy reading.
